param.value: "TC_LEAVE_01 - Employee can apply for annual leave"
"TC_LEAVE_02 - System rejects leave with invalid date range"
"TC_LEAVE_03 - Admin can approve employee leave request"
"TC_LEAVE_04 - Admin can reject employee leave request"
"TC_MYINFO_03 - System rejects invalid date format in DOB field"
"TC_MYINFO_05 - First name field respects maximum character boundary"
"TC_PIM_01 - Admin can add a new employee with mandatory fields"
"TC_PIM_03 - Validation triggers when mandatory fields are empty"
"TC_PIM_04 - Admin can search for an existing employee"
"TC_PIM_05 - Admin can delete an employee record"
"TC_REC_01 - Admin can add a new job vacancy"
"TC_REC_02 - Vacancy creation fails without job title"
"TC_REC_03 - Admin can add candidate for a vacancy"
"TC_REC_05 - Admin can search candidates by vacancy"
